text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Risk Score Operational Payment Base and Model Output User Guide │ June 2026 │ V 1.1 2 

2.0 Background 

Differences in beneficiaries’ health status can have a significant influence on their expected health care use and spending, or 
payment risk. One tool that can help understand those differences is the risk scores that Medicare uses to adjust payments to 
MA plans to account for differences in health status among plan
